name: INGLES MARKETS INC
summary: Ingles Markets, Incorporated is a leading supermarket chain in the southeast United States, operating 194 supermarkets across North Carolina, Georgia, South Carolina, Tennessee, Virginia, and Alabama. The Company offers nationally advertised grocery, meat, dairy, produce, frozen foods, perishables, fuel centers, pharmacies, health and beauty products, private label items, and organic/locally-sourced goods. It also owns and operates warehouse/distribution facilities and a milk processing and packaging plant supplying approximately 65% of milk products sold in its stores.

products.name: Retail Grocery
products.description: Supermarket operations offering grocery, meat, dairy, produce, frozen foods, and non-food products across 194 stores in the southeast US.

products.name: Fuel Centers
products.description: On-premises fuel centers located at supermarket locations for customer convenience.

products.name: Pharmacy
products.description: In-store pharmacies offered at supermarket locations throughout the company's market area.

products.name: Private Label Products
products.description: Quality private label items including organic and locally-sourced products sold throughout market areas.

products.name: Milk Processing and Packaging
products.description: Company-owned plant supplying approximately 65% of stores' milk needs and selling to retailers in 18 states.

products.name: Online Ordering
products.description: Online ordering of products for in-store pickup at Ingles supermarket locations.
